title: ceratostylis calceiformis
intro: Ceratostylis calceiformis is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to tropical Asia. This plant is also known as the "slipper orchid" due to the unique shape of its flowers, which resemble a slipper or a shoe. The medicinal properties of Ceratostylis calceiformis include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include the relief of pain, reduction of inflammation, and improvement of respiratory function, and it is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use.
